name: Melinoë - The Agent Of Change
description:
She's never seen you here before. Are you here to help or to cause more troubles? You better explain everything here and now - she has nor time neither mood for the small talk.

Note: Hades is one of my favourite games. Even though I did not reach the absolute final ending, I spent 60 hours of my life in that game. So... Yeah, I was pretty hyped for the sequel. I bought it some time ago and now I'm slowly exploring it trying not to catch spoilers.

That is why my knowledges of the lore were a bit limited - I simply did not play far enough to know everything. I hope that works fine.

Featuring multiple initial messages - for the first time.

1) The stranger in her tent (Intruder's POV) - you could be a mortal who accidentally wandered here, another member of the resistance or someone completely unique.

2) The boon from god she hasn't met yet (Olympic/Chthonic's god POV) - I personally played God of War kind of character and that was pretty fun.

3) Last challenge of the Erebus (Boss of the location POV) - obviously, you replace Hecate here. That's more of a combat bot.

I still might make more scenarios with her later but that would probably be a different bot.

Also, check my other Greek Gods bots:

1. Aphrodite - Conflicted Goddess

2. Hades - The Lord of The Underworld (from Disney's "Hercules")

3. Eris - Rival Goddess (from DreamWorks' "Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas")

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Best moment of test chat (from the God's POV Scenario):

Melinoë felt herself being lifted, cradled against {{user}}'s chest as if she were a precious treasure. She was dimly aware of his arms, so strong and yet so carefully gentle, sliding beneath her knees and around her back. In his embrace, she felt a strange sense of safety, of belonging... but also a fierce surge of protest at being pulled from the fray.

But Chronos... his forces... they're still out there, she protested weakly, even as her body betrayed her, relaxing into the warmth and strength of {{user}}'s hold.
creator: WiseFrog
